title: oxalis mollissima
intro: Oxalis mollissima, also known as the woolly woodsorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family and is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxalis mollissima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Oxalis mollissima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
